career_timeline.org: 潮州市湘桥区人民政府
career_timeline.title: 区长
career_timeline.notes: Confirmed as current 区长. Delivered 2026年政府工作报告 at 湘桥区第七届人民代表大会第六次会议 on 2026-03-07. Also presided over 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 on 2026-07-22.

organizations.name: 潮州市湘桥区人民政府

relationships.evidence: Confirmed working relationship as 区长 (李树南) reporting to 区委书记 (王长春). Both presided over 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 on 2026-07-22.
Both attended 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 on 2026-07-22.

governance_record.achievement_or_event: Delivered 2026年政府工作报告 at 湘桥区第七届人民代表大会第六次会议, reporting the 十四五 achievements: GDP exceeded 30 billion yuan, 5-year average growth 3.8%, and outlining 十五五 goals with 6% annual GDP growth target.
governance_record.measurable_outcome: GDP reached 335.15 billion yuan in 2025 (4.2% growth)

governance_record.achievement_or_event: Presided over 城中村整治百日攻坚动员大会 as meeting chair, supporting 区委书记王长春's leadership.
